text:
is a fictional , set in the Rebuild of Evangelion.

Profile

Kuroshio is a conglomerate that has various business in different areas of activity, usually seen as the manufacturers of various items in the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. They produce and offer services like transportation of goods, and production of clothes, food, construction equipment, and electrical equipment. Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone - Complete Records Visual Story Edition - Setting Material Edition p.329-330 

Trivia

In the Khara inc. x collaboration project Mobile Suit Gundam GQuuuuuuX, a civilian Zaku, is seen with the markings on the body. https://www.gundam.info/feature/gquuuuuux/mecha/9/
